scripts.dev: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && concurrently -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server dev" "pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web dev" "pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot dev"
scripts.start:demo: concurrently -k -c blue,green,magenta "VOICYCLAW_SQLITE_FILE=./apps/server/.data/voicyclaw.sqlite node ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs apps/server/src/index.ts" "pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web start" "node ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs apps/mock-bot/src/index.ts"
scripts.build: pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.ci:check: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:e2e
